ScamReport.title: Scam Report
ScamReport.description: A report detailing a scam encounter.

target.description: The scam target (URL, phone number, email, or handle).

targetType.description: The category of the scam target.

description.description: A detailed explanation of the scam.

scamDate.description: When the scam occurred or was discovered.

reporterId.description: The ID of the user who reported it.

reporterEmail.description: Email of the reporter (for internal moderation).

createdAt.description: When the report was first submitted.

updatedAt.description: When the report was last updated.

evidenceUrls.description: Links to screenshots or other evidence.

votesCount.description: Number of users who found this report helpful.

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Basic public information about a user.
